name: Core & Main, Inc.
business: Core & Main is a leading specialty distributor of water, wastewater, storm drainage and fire protection products, and related services. It provides solutions to municipalities, private water companies and professional contractors across municipal, non-residential and residential end markets.

exposures.sentence: Our offering consists of pipes, valves & fittings, storm drainage products, fire protection products and smart metering products.
Our offering consists of pipes, valves & fittings, storm drainage products, fire protection products and smart metering products.
Our offering consists of pipes, valves & fittings, storm drainage products, fire protection products and smart metering products.
Our offering consists of pipes, valves & fittings, storm drainage products, fire protection products and smart metering products.

We complement our core products through additional offerings, including smart meter systems, fusible high-density polyethylene (fusible HDPE) piping solutions, specifically engineered treatment plant products, geosynthetics and erosion control products.

catalysts.event: Infrastructure Investment and Jobs Act (IIJA) signed into law, allocating $55 billion for water infrastructure
catalysts.sentence: In November 2021, the Infrastructure Investment and Jobs Act (IIJA) was signed into U.S. law, which included an allocation of $55 billion to invest in water infrastructure across the U.S., the majority of which we believe has yet to be realized.

catalysts.event: Acquisition of Pioneer Supply LLC (pipes, valves & fittings, storm drainage, meter products)
catalysts.sentence: Pioneer Supply LLC Pipes, Valves & Fittings; Storm Drainage; Meter products January 2026

catalysts.event: Acquisition of Canada Waterworks Inc. and Canada Waterworks Ottawa Inc. (pipes, valves & fittings, storm drainage)
catalysts.sentence: Canada Waterworks Inc. and Canada Waterworks Ottawa Inc. Pipes, Valves & Fittings; Storm Drainage September 2025

tamClaims.claim: Approximately $44 billion in annual sales for the water, wastewater, storm drainage and fire protection products distribution market in the U.S. and Canada.
tamClaims.sentence: Based on management's estimates, we believe that our addressable market in the U.S. and Canada for the distribution of water, wastewater, storm drainage and fire protection products, and related services, represented approximately $44 billion in sales in fiscal 2025.
